goal: Build a fully local deterministic orchestration module that runs the five completed video-language-transformation subprojects as one end-to-end pipeline, passes artifacts between them through explicit contracts, validates each stage boundary, and produces a final pipeline report with downstream-ready outputs.
summary: Deterministic sequential pipeline runner with strict execution contract, isolated workspace, explicit artifact mapping, strong validation, and machine-readable reporting. Runner orchestrates and validates only, never modifies artifacts.
constraints: All paths must be explicit and stable
Runner must only orchestrate and validate
All processing logic belongs to subprojects
